title: Gitignore sensitive files + root debris
spec: Add to .gitignore: api-keys-report.json, telegram_tokens_safe.yaml, *.sqlite, .loki/. Remove api-keys-report.json from tracking with git rm --cached.

title: Fix CORS * on 2 active edge functions
spec: In sales-aggression/index.ts and update-currency-rates/index.ts — replace hardcoded Access-Control-Allow-Origin: * with import from _shared/cors.ts.

title: Kill Math.random() in SystemHealthMonitor
spec: src/components/dashboard/SystemHealthMonitor.tsx line 42 uses Math.random()*100+50 for API latency. Replace with real data from ai_execution_metrics table (avg latency_ms). Show dash if no data.

title: Kill Math.random() in MetricDrilldownModal
spec: Lines 76-102 use Math.random() for change %. Lines 181-182 generate 30 days of Math.random()*50000 for Trend tab. Lines 237-258 hardcoded AI Insights. Replace trends with real period-over-period from source table. Remove fake insights or link to AI Advisor.

title: Fix hardcoded 65% renewal in PredictiveIntelligence
spec: Line 327 hardcoded '65% renewal rate'. Calculate from real deals data or show dash.

title: Regenerate Supabase types.ts
spec: Run: npx supabase gen types typescript --project-id ztjndilxurtsfqdsvfds > src/integrations/supabase/types.ts

title: Remove unnecessary as never casts
spec: Remove 'as never' from: useClientActivity.ts (2), useSessionIntelligence.ts (1), usePredictions.ts (2), useDailyOps.ts (1). Keep 'as never' on RPC calls.

title: Fix as any casts where possible
spec: CoachLocations.tsx Leaflet window.L → proper global declaration. RevenueVsSpendChart.tsx Record<string,any> → typed metric interface.

title: Fix unified-ai-client deprecated models
spec: unified-ai-client.ts line 193 gemini-1.5-flash → gemini-2.0-flash. langsmith-tracing.ts line 292 same.

title: Fix ai-ceo-master hardcoded model
spec: Lines 319,361 hardcode gemini-2.0-flash. Use UnifiedAI cascade instead.

title: Fix multi-agent-orchestrator hardcoded model
spec: Lines 128,172 hardcode gemini-2.0-flash. Use UnifiedAI cascade.

title: Fix ptd-ultimate-intelligence hardcoded model
spec: Lines 699,747,783 hardcode gemini-2.0-flash (3 calls). Use UnifiedAI cascade.

title: Fix smart-ai-advisor hardcoded model
spec: Line 253 hardcodes gemini-2.0-flash. Use UnifiedAI cascade.

title: Fix vision-analytics hardcoded model
spec: Line 29 hardcodes gemini-2.0-flash. Use UnifiedAI cascade.

title: Fix marketing-copywriter deprecated model
spec: Line 156 uses gemini-1.5-flash. Update to gemini-2.0-flash or UnifiedAI.

title: Remove refetchInterval violations
spec: Remove refetchInterval from: SystemHealthMonitor (30s), DataFreshnessWidget (60s), DataFreshnessBanner (5min). Use staleTime + manual refetch.

title: Add limits to unbounded select(*) queries
spec: Add .limit() to: MarketingIntelligence.tsx:1164 (500), ExecutiveOverview.tsx:77 (30), SalesPipelineFeed.tsx:55 (500), ProactiveInsightsPanel.tsx:75 (100), ptd-unlimited-agent.ts:410 (50).

title: Add WidgetErrorBoundary for dashboard widgets
spec: Create WidgetErrorBoundary component. Wrap main dashboard widgets in ExecutiveOverview, CommandCenter, DailyOps so one widget crash doesn't take down the page.

title: Remove console.log from 48 production files
spec: Remove/replace console.log/warn/error in active src/ files. Keep console.error only in catch blocks that re-throw. Priority: ptd-auto-learn.ts (14), PTDUnlimitedChat.tsx (11), PTDControlChat.tsx (10), ptd-memory.ts (8). Do NOT touch _archived/.

title: Verify stripe-webhook configuration
spec: Read stripe-webhook/index.ts. Document: what events it handles, does it insert into stripe_transactions, is STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET set. Report findings only — do NOT modify.

title: Check stripe-backfill function existence
spec: Check if stripe-backfill edge function exists. Document what's needed to backfill. Do NOT run anything — report only.

title: Organize root-level debris to docs/archive
spec: Move stale root .json/.md/.sh/.py files to docs/archive/. Keep: package.json, tsconfig.json, vite.config.ts, tailwind.config.ts, CLAUDE.md, README.md, .env*. Do NOT delete anything.

title: Update .gitignore comprehensively
spec: Add: .loki/, api-keys-report.json, telegram_tokens_safe.yaml, *.sqlite, docs/archive/
